title: Consultation: Benzene Releases from Gasoline Stations: Implications for Human Health - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation: Benzene Releases from Gasoline Stations: Implications for Human Health

## Current status: Closed
Closed to new input on July 27, 2022 .

## About the consultation
The purpose of this consultation was to solicit comments on the draft risk assessment Benzene Releases from Gasoline Stations: Implications for Human Health .

### Who was the focus of this consultation
This consultation was intended for scientific or technical audiences, including:
- federal, provincial and territorial regulatory and health protection agencies
- industry stakeholders
- academic communities
- non-governmental organizations
Comments were also welcome from members of the general public.
Water and Air Quality Bureau, Health Canada 269 Laurier Avenue West Address Locator 4903B Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9 Email: air@hc-sc.gc.ca
